--- is_labeled.sql
a IS LABELED A & B | C

--- AST
&ast.IsLabeledExpr{
  Left: &ast.Ident{
    NameEnd: 1,
    Name:    "a",
  },
  Label: &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
    Op:   "|",
    Left: &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
      Op:   "&",
      Left: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
        Name: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 13,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "A",
        },
      },
      Right: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
        Name: &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 17,
          NameEnd: 18,
          Name:    "B",
        },
      },
    },
    Right: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 21,
        NameEnd: 22,
        Name:    "C",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
a IS LABELED A & B | C
